title: Simpler Health Indicator
description: This is a very simple health indicator
body:
# I am sorry
Hello! So this is my first fabric mod, and I made an error which made the mod unuseable. I am so sorry. If you find any bugs, please dm me on signal: polokalap.01

This is a very simple health indicator.
You can toggle it by pressing the U key by default, but you can modify it in the game settings.

# Colors:
20-15: green
15-10: yellow
10-5: gold
5-0: red

If the player has under 5 hp (2.5 hearts), the mod will show the decimal values.

For example:

Polokalap 20

Polokalap 8

Polokalap 3.17
